name: claude-chrome
description: Chrome extension embedding Claude Code CLI with full browser context via MCP

scripts.setup: npm install && cd native-host && npm install && npm run build
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run build:host
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:host && node scripts/test-agent-runtime.js && node scripts/test-session-history.js && node scripts/test-panel-state-file.js && node scripts/test-working-directory.js && node scripts/test-workspace-default-agent.js && node scripts/test-terminal-shortcuts.js && node scripts/test-terminal-input.js && node scripts/test-capture-utils.js && node scripts/test-network-update-buffer.js && node scripts/test-pty-cleanup.js && node scripts/test-exit-cleanup.js && node scripts/test-commands.js && node scripts/test-dispatcher.js
scripts.test:live: npm run build && npm run build:host && node scripts/test-live.js
scripts.test:live:config-settings: npm run build && npm run build:host && node scripts/test-live-config-settings.js
scripts.test:live:focused: npm run build && npm run build:host && node scripts/test-live-path-shortcuts.js
scripts.test:live:all: npm run build && npm run build:host && node scripts/test-live.js && node scripts/test-live-config-settings.js && node scripts/test-live-path-shortcuts.js
scripts.ci:release: npm run ci && npm run ci:live && npm run release:check && npm run release:artifacts && npm run release:smoke
